light.description: Fast local screening stack for small projects and demos.

standard.description: Default planning stack for GIS, OSM routing, GTFS, accessibility, and reports.

full.description: Max local transportation modeling lab with simulation, optimization, and bridge runtimes.

gpu.description: Optional ML/deep-learning profile for calibrated or surrogate models.

tools.name: Python 3
tools.purpose: Runs the ClawModeler sidecar and Python modeling workflows.
tools.agent_use: Execute intake, planning, modeling, QA, and export commands.

tools.name: Java runtime
tools.agent_use: Use for R5 and MATSim workflows when enabled.

tools.name: DuckDB
tools.purpose: Local analytical database and workspace store.
tools.agent_use: Store project tables, fact-blocks, scenario specs, and reproducibility state.

tools.name: pandas
tools.agent_use: Clean CSVs, summarize model outputs, and prepare report tables.

tools.name: GeoPandas
tools.agent_use: Perform spatial joins, CRS transforms, and map layer preparation.

tools.name: Shapely
tools.agent_use: Validate and repair geometries when DuckDB spatial is unavailable.

tools.name: pyproj
tools.agent_use: Detect and transform CRS for planning inputs.

tools.name: GDAL/OGR
tools.agent_use: Inspect Shapefiles, GeoPackages, rasters, and projection metadata.

tools.name: NetworkX
tools.agent_use: Compute accessibility paths and network metrics.

tools.name: OSMnx
tools.purpose: OpenStreetMap network acquisition and routing preparation.
tools.agent_use: Build local street networks, add edge speeds, and cache GraphML.

tools.name: Conveyal R5
tools.agent_use: Use for GTFS plus OSM transit accessibility matrices.

tools.name: SUMO binary
tools.agent_use: Run detailed corridor and operations scenarios.

tools.name: SUMO local source
tools.agent_use: Build or inspect SUMO tooling and create bridge exports.

tools.name: MATSim local source
tools.agent_use: Prepare MATSim network/population/plans handoffs.

tools.name: UrbanSim local source
tools.agent_use: Prepare long-horizon land-use scenario bridge workflows.

tools.name: DTALite local source
tools.agent_use: Prepare network and OD matrix handoffs for DTA workflows.

tools.name: TBEST tools local source
tools.agent_use: Ingest or prepare TBEST-style transit ridership handoffs.

tools.name: OR-Tools
tools.agent_use: Optimize project bundles, phasing, routing, and constrained selections.

tools.name: scikit-learn
tools.agent_use: Build exploratory demand, clustering, or surrogate models with validation.

tools.name: PyTorch
tools.agent_use: Use only with training data and validation for ML-assisted modeling.

tools.name: XGBoost
tools.agent_use: Model calibrated demand or surrogate outcomes when labeled data exist.

tools.name: Pandoc
tools.agent_use: Convert Markdown reports to DOCX/PDF when configured.

tools.name: Graphviz
tools.agent_use: Render method, workflow, and network diagrams for reports.

tools.name: Docker or compatible runtime
tools.agent_use: Run reproducible full-stack model containers when available.

method_policy.when: quick screening, small agency, incomplete data
method_policy.fallback: Use proxy screening and label limitations.
Compute GTFS route metrics and stop-access proxies.
Create SUMO bridge export and request demand/network detail.
Create MATSim bridge export and request population/plans.
Create UrbanSim bridge export and request development inputs.
Use ML only as exploratory unless training and validation data exist.
